reviews.author: J. M.
reviews.text: Andy diagnosed a panel issue quickly, explained the repair in plain language, and had everything working the same day. Professional from start to finish.

reviews.author: Carla P.
reviews.text: We called for troubleshooting after repeated breaker trips. Polos Electronics showed up on time, fixed the underlying wiring issue, and the pricing was fair.

reviews.author: A. N.
reviews.text: We have used Polos Electronics, a local company, for 25 years. We are very happy with them.

reviews.author: A. T.
reviews.text: I would recommend Cat 6a over regular Cat 6 to future-proof. Polos Electronics in Battle Ground installed Ethernet in our existing home and did a great job.

reviews.author: M. B.
reviews.text: Polos Electronics at 360-687-3543. We have used them for 19 years. Andy Polos.

reviews.author: Verified Neighbors
reviews.text: Polos Electronics in Battle Ground is highly recommended for home audio/video, smart TV setup, networking, and clean installation work.

fallbackReviews.author: J. M.
fallbackReviews.text: Andy diagnosed a panel issue quickly, explained the repair in plain language, and had everything working the same day. Professional from start to finish.

fallbackReviews.author: Carla P.
fallbackReviews.text: We called for troubleshooting after repeated breaker trips. Polos Electronics showed up on time, fixed the underlying wiring issue, and the pricing was fair.

fallbackReviews.author: Neighbor in Battle Ground
fallbackReviews.text: Recommended. Great communication, tidy work area, and clear updates throughout the job. We would call Polos Electronics again for future electrical work.
